// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly;

/// <summary>
/// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
/// </summary>
public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssemblyServices(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddScoped(typeof(global::TestNamespace.SingleArityService<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.SingleArityService<>));
        services.AddScoped(typeof(global::TestNamespace.IGenericService<>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.SingleArityService<>));
        services.AddSingleton(typeof(global::TestNamespace.DoubleArityService<,>), typeof(global::TestNamespace.DoubleArityService<,>));

        return services;
    }
}
